title: MiMo-v2.5-Pro-UltraSpeed: 1T model with 1000 tokens per second
summary: MiMo-v2.5-Pro-UltraSpeed is a 1-trillion-parameter model achieving 1000 tokens per second inference speed, likely through novel architecture or hardware optimization. The model pushes the frontier of large-scale deployment efficiency, sparking discussion on trade-offs between speed, quality, and scale.
